name: CoreTAP Overview — The Money You're Leaving on the Table
description: 8-step first-look at CoreTAP that surfaces hidden revenue, voids, and staff performance for any bar owner in under 4 minutes.

steps.title: Welcome to [BAR_NAME]'s CoreTAP Dashboard
steps.annotation: This is the command center for [BAR_NAME]. Everything you need to know about your bar's health is on this single screen — built specifically for owners and GMs who don't have time to dig through reports.
steps.screen_hint: Capture the main CoreTAP dashboard landing page with the bar name in the header and all KPI widgets visible.

steps.title: Revenue Pulse — Live, Not Lagging
steps.annotation: This Revenue Pulse widget updates every 5 minutes from your POS. No more waiting for end-of-night reports — see [BAR_NAME]'s revenue as it happens, with comparisons against last week and last month.
steps.screen_hint: Zoom on the Revenue Pulse widget showing today vs yesterday vs last week comparison.

steps.title: Golden Hours — Where Your Money Actually Comes From
steps.annotation: Most bars make 60% of their nightly revenue in just 3 hours. Golden Hours pinpoints exactly when [BAR_NAME]'s peak window is — so you can staff smarter, push happy hour tighter, and stop bleeding labor cost in the dead zones.
steps.screen_hint: Zoom in on the Golden Hours banner / peak-window heatmap on the dashboard.

steps.title: Active Voids Alert — Theft Doesn't Hide Anymore
steps.annotation: Every void on every ticket, flagged in real time. CoreTAP groups suspicious patterns by employee and shows you the dollar amount at risk — not just the count. This alone has paid for the system at most of our bars within 30 days.
steps.screen_hint: Highlight the Active Voids alert badge with a real number (e.g. '$847 in voids today').

steps.title: Staff Performance Ring — Who's Carrying the Bar
steps.annotation: A-D grading on every employee, every shift. The ring shows you at a glance who your A-players are and where your D-players are dragging revenue down. [TIER] tier gives you the full leaderboard.
steps.screen_hint: Capture the Staff Performance ring widget with A/B/C/D segments visible.

steps.title: Quick Wins — Action, Not Analysis Paralysis
steps.annotation: CoreTAP doesn't just show you problems — it tells you the next move. The Quick Wins feed is a daily action list: cut this shift, push this drink, talk to this employee. No dashboards-for-the-sake-of-dashboards.
steps.screen_hint: Show the Quick Wins action feed with 3-5 concrete recommendations listed.

steps.title: The Average Bar Loses $2,100/mo to Blind Spots
steps.annotation: Across the bars we've onboarded, owners discover an average of $2,100/month in recoverable revenue in their first 30 days — voids, missed peak staffing, and underperforming employees they couldn't see before. For [BAR_NAME], we'd expect a similar or larger find.
steps.screen_hint: Full-screen popup stat card with the $2,100/mo figure prominently displayed and a small bar-icon supporting graphic.

steps.title: See What CoreTAP Finds in Your Bar
steps.annotation: Drop your email and we'll set up a free 14-day audit on [BAR_NAME]'s actual POS data. No commitment, no card required — you'll see the dollars before you ever decide to subscribe.
steps.screen_hint: Lead capture form overlay with fields: Name, Email, Bar Name, Phone (optional). Form should match DK brand styling.
